languages.text: {n}Дверь с лязгом отходит в сторону. Из скрытого за ней помещения вырывается спертый воздух, несущий с собой частицы многовековой пыли.{/n}
{n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Дверь с лязгом отходит в сторону. Из скрытого за ней помещения вырывается спертый воздух, несущий с собой частицы многовековой пыли.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}
{n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}
{n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La puerta se desliza a un lado con ruido metálico. De la sala secreta sopla una bocanada de aire rancio, cargada de siglos de polvo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La puerta se desliza a un lado con ruido metálico. De la sala secreta sopla una bocanada de aire rancio, cargada de siglos de polvo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伴随着金属撞击般的闷响，大门缓缓滑向一侧。陈腐的空气从密室里涌出，挟带着数百年来沉积的尘埃。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着金属撞击般的闷响，大门缓缓滑向一侧。陈腐的空气从密室里涌出，挟带着数百年来沉积的尘埃。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La porte glisse sur le côté avec un bruit métallique mat. Une bouffée d'air vicié s'échappe de la salle secrète, entraînant dans son sillage des particules de poussière multiséculaires.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La porte glisse sur le côté avec un bruit métallique mat. Une bouffée d'air vicié s'échappe de la salle secrète, entraînant dans son sillage des particules de poussière multiséculaires.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kapı, metalik bir gümbürtüyle bir yana doğru kayıyor. Asırlık toz parçacıklarını da beraberinde taşıyan bayat bir hava, gizli odadan dışarıya akın ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kapı, metalik bir gümbürtüyle bir yana doğru kayıyor. Asırlık toz parçacıklarını da beraberinde taşıyan bayat bir hava, gizli odadan dışarıya akın ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ドアは金属音と共に横にスライドする。隠された部屋から古い空気と、何百年もの時を経た埃の粒子が流れ出す。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ドアは金属音と共に横にスライドする。隠された部屋から古い空気と、何百年もの時を経た埃の粒子が流れ出す。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Tür gleitet mit einem metallischen Geräusch zur Seite. Aus dem verborgenen Raum schlagen dir abgestandene Luft und jahrhundertealter Staub entgegen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The door slides to one side with a metallic thud. Stale air rushes out of the hidden room, carrying with it particles of centuries-old dust.{/n}
